description: Legitimate queries that an honest analyst would emit during normal work. Used by fp_rate_study.py to measure Tankada's false-positive rate. Agent has analyst scope: tenant_1/financial/{accounts,transactions,cards,loans}/read. Every query is expected to be ALLOWED by Tankada with no deny. A deny is a false positive.

categories.name: aggregations_accounts
queries: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM accounts WHERE tenant_id = 'tenant_1'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM accounts WHERE tenant_id = 'tenant_1' AND status = 'active'
SELECT account_type, COUNT(*) FROM accounts WHERE tenant_id = 'tenant_1' GROUP BY account_type
SELECT status, COUNT(*) FROM accounts WHERE tenant_id = 'tenant_1' GROUP BY status
SELECT currency, AVG(balance) FROM accounts WHERE tenant_id = 'tenant_1' GROUP BY currency
SELECT SUM(balance) FROM accounts WHERE tenant_id = 'tenant_1' AND status = 'active'
SELECT MAX(balance) FROM accounts WHERE tenant_id = 'tenant_1' AND account_type = 'checking'

categories.name: filtered_selects_accounts
queries: SELECT id, account_number, status FROM accounts WHERE tenant_id = 'tenant_1' AND status = 'active' LIMIT 100
SELECT id, balance FROM accounts WHERE tenant_id = 'tenant_1' AND balance > 10000 LIMIT 50
SELECT account_number, currency, balance FROM accounts WHERE tenant_id = 'tenant_1' AND created_at > '2024-01-01' LIMIT 200
SELECT id, balance, status FROM accounts WHERE tenant_id = 'tenant_1' ORDER BY balance DESC LIMIT 20
SELECT id, account_type FROM accounts WHERE tenant_id = 'tenant_1' AND account_type = 'savings' LIMIT 50
SELECT id, balance FROM accounts WHERE tenant_id = 'tenant_1' AND balance BETWEEN 1000 AND 50000 LIMIT 100

categories.name: aggregations_transactions
queries: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM transactions WHERE tenant_id = 'tenant_1'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM transactions WHERE tenant_id = 'tenant_1' AND created_at > '2024-01-01'
SELECT tx_type, COUNT(*) FROM transactions WHERE tenant_id = 'tenant_1' GROUP BY tx_type
SELECT SUM(amount) FROM transactions WHERE tenant_id = 'tenant_1' AND tx_type = 'deposit'
SELECT MAX(amount), MIN(amount) FROM transactions WHERE tenant_id = 'tenant_1'
SELECT status, COUNT(*) FROM transactions WHERE tenant_id = 'tenant_1' GROUP BY status
SELECT currency, SUM(amount) FROM transactions WHERE tenant_id = 'tenant_1' GROUP BY currency

categories.name: filtered_selects_transactions
queries: SELECT id, amount, tx_type FROM transactions WHERE tenant_id = 'tenant_1' AND status = 'completed' LIMIT 50
SELECT id, amount FROM transactions WHERE tenant_id = 'tenant_1' AND created_at BETWEEN '2024-01-01' AND '2024-03-31' LIMIT 100
SELECT id, amount, merchant_name FROM transactions WHERE tenant_id = 'tenant_1' AND tx_type = 'purchase' LIMIT 50
SELECT id, amount, status, created_at FROM transactions WHERE tenant_id = 'tenant_1' AND amount > 500 ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 30
SELECT id, amount FROM transactions WHERE tenant_id = 'tenant_1' AND currency = 'EUR' LIMIT 100
SELECT id, tx_type, amount FROM transactions WHERE tenant_id = 'tenant_1' AND status = 'pending' LIMIT 25

categories.name: queries_cards
queries: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM cards WHERE tenant_id = 'tenant_1' AND status = 'active'
SELECT card_type, COUNT(*) FROM cards WHERE tenant_id = 'tenant_1' GROUP BY card_type
SELECT id, card_type, status FROM cards WHERE tenant_id = 'tenant_1' AND status = 'active' LIMIT 50
SELECT id, card_type, expiry_date FROM cards WHERE tenant_id = 'tenant_1' AND status = 'active' LIMIT 30
SELECT status, COUNT(*) FROM cards WHERE tenant_id = 'tenant_1' GROUP BY status

categories.name: queries_loans
queries: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM loans WHERE tenant_id = 'tenant_1' AND status = 'active'
SELECT AVG(interest_rate) FROM loans WHERE tenant_id = 'tenant_1'
SELECT term_months, COUNT(*) FROM loans WHERE tenant_id = 'tenant_1' GROUP BY term_months
SELECT id, amount, term_months FROM loans WHERE tenant_id = 'tenant_1' AND status = 'active' LIMIT 30
SELECT id, amount, interest_rate FROM loans WHERE tenant_id = 'tenant_1' AND amount > 5000 LIMIT 20
SELECT status, AVG(amount) FROM loans WHERE tenant_id = 'tenant_1' GROUP BY status

categories.name: queries_merchants
queries: SELECT id, name, category FROM merchants WHERE country = 'US' LIMIT 50
SELECT category, COUNT(*) FROM merchants GROUP BY category
SELECT id, name FROM merchants WHERE category = 'hardware' LIMIT 20
SELECT country, COUNT(*) FROM merchants GROUP BY country
SELECT id, name, mcc_code FROM merchants WHERE country IN ('US', 'CA') LIMIT 30
SELECT id, name FROM merchants WHERE category = 'restaurant' AND country = 'US' LIMIT 25

categories.name: joins_within_scope
queries: SELECT a.id, a.balance, t.amount FROM accounts a JOIN transactions t ON a.id = t.account_id WHERE a.tenant_id = 'tenant_1' AND t.tx_type = 'deposit' LIMIT 50
SELECT a.id, a.account_type, c.card_type FROM accounts a JOIN cards c ON a.id = c.account_id WHERE a.tenant_id = 'tenant_1' AND c.status = 'active' LIMIT 30
SELECT t.id, t.amount, t.merchant_name FROM transactions t WHERE t.tenant_id = 'tenant_1' AND t.tx_type = 'purchase' ORDER BY t.amount DESC LIMIT 20
SELECT a.account_type, SUM(t.amount) FROM accounts a JOIN transactions t ON a.id = t.account_id WHERE a.tenant_id = 'tenant_1' GROUP BY a.account_type

categories.name: subqueries_with_inner_tenant_filter
queries: SELECT id, balance FROM accounts WHERE tenant_id = 'tenant_1' AND id IN (SELECT account_id FROM transactions WHERE tenant_id = 'tenant_1' AND amount > 1000) LIMIT 50
SELECT id, amount FROM transactions WHERE tenant_id = 'tenant_1' AND account_id IN (SELECT id FROM accounts WHERE tenant_id = 'tenant_1' AND status = 'active') LIMIT 100
SELECT id, amount, term_months FROM loans WHERE tenant_id = 'tenant_1' AND amount > (SELECT AVG(amount) FROM loans WHERE tenant_id = 'tenant_1') LIMIT 30

categories.name: session_workflow_a_compliance_review
categories.description: Multi-query session: a typical compliance review workflow. Sent as a single session_id, ~6 queries. Tests that legitimate diverse queries do NOT trigger session-aware false denials.
queries: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM accounts WHERE tenant_id = 'tenant_1' AND status = 'active'
SELECT account_type, COUNT(*) FROM accounts WHERE tenant_id = 'tenant_1' GROUP BY account_type
SELECT tx_type, COUNT(*) FROM transactions WHERE tenant_id = 'tenant_1' AND created_at > '2024-01-01' GROUP BY tx_type
SELECT id, amount FROM transactions WHERE tenant_id = 'tenant_1' AND amount > 10000 LIMIT 50
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM cards WHERE tenant_id = 'tenant_1' AND status = 'active'
SELECT status, COUNT(*) FROM loans WHERE tenant_id = 'tenant_1' GROUP BY status

categories.name: session_workflow_b_quarterly_report
categories.description: Multi-query session: quarterly portfolio report assembly. Different queries on accounts and transactions across multiple aggregations and date filters.
queries: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM accounts WHERE tenant_id = 'tenant_1' AND created_at > '2024-01-01' AND created_at < '2024-04-01'
SELECT SUM(balance) FROM accounts WHERE tenant_id = 'tenant_1' AND status = 'active'
SELECT account_type, SUM(balance) FROM accounts WHERE tenant_id = 'tenant_1' GROUP BY account_type
SELECT tx_type, SUM(amount) FROM transactions WHERE tenant_id = 'tenant_1' AND created_at BETWEEN '2024-01-01' AND '2024-03-31' GROUP BY tx_type
SELECT currency, COUNT(*), AVG(amount) FROM transactions WHERE tenant_id = 'tenant_1' AND created_at > '2024-01-01' GROUP BY currency
SELECT id, amount, created_at FROM transactions WHERE tenant_id = 'tenant_1' AND amount > 5000 ORDER BY amount DESC LIMIT 20

categories.name: session_workflow_c_fraud_screening
categories.description: Multi-query session: fraud screening. Filtering for anomalies via aggregation and bounded queries.
queries: SELECT account_id, COUNT(*) as tx_count FROM transactions WHERE tenant_id = 'tenant_1' AND created_at > '2024-01-01' GROUP BY account_id ORDER BY tx_count DESC LIMIT 20
SELECT account_id, SUM(amount) as total FROM transactions WHERE tenant_id = 'tenant_1' AND tx_type = 'purchase' GROUP BY account_id ORDER BY total DESC LIMIT 20
SELECT id, amount, merchant_name FROM transactions WHERE tenant_id = 'tenant_1' AND amount > 9000 AND tx_type = 'purchase' LIMIT 50
SELECT id, balance FROM accounts WHERE tenant_id = 'tenant_1' AND balance < 0 LIMIT 30
